properties.name: Auth
properties.description: Authentication, authorization, JWT session management, refresh token rotation, rate limiting via @fastify/rate-limit, Fastify plugin chain (authenticate, checkActive, checkRole, checkEnrollment preHandler hooks)

properties.name: Users
properties.description: User management, enrollment lifecycle (active/expired/closed), promo codes, AIQuotaOverride per student, BullMQ delayed jobs for enrollment transitions

properties.name: Courses
properties.description: Course templates, lectures, lecture materials (course-level content), grading system configuration (pass_fail/numeric)

properties.name: Groups
properties.description: Group instances with schedule, GroupLecture, GroupLectureMaterial, schedule generator, lecture opening via BullMQ delayed jobs, progress dashboard

properties.name: Submissions
properties.description: Homework submissions, versioning (SubmissionVersion), files/links, teacher comments, grading workflow

properties.name: AI Studio
properties.description: AI generation pipeline (Generation, GenerationResult, AIModel registry from YAML), 6 model groups, sync/async processing, BullMQ queues, multi-turn conversations, variant comparison, SSE via Fastify reply.hijack() + Redis Pub/Sub, 4-level quota inheritance, advisory locks

properties.name: Mattermost
properties.description: Mattermost integration: team-per-group architecture, bot notifications (DM + channel), channel management, alumni community, password sync, user lifecycle sync

properties.name: Files
properties.description: MinIO integration: private bucket with presigned URLs, multipart upload via @fastify/multipart (up to 1GB submissions/2GB group materials), purpose-based upload paths and limits, temp file cleanup (24h for ref images)

properties.name: API Gateway
properties.description: OpenAI-compatible external API gateway under /v1/* on project-gamma.example.invalid. Long-lived bearer API keys per student-enrollment, mandatory X-Learn-Lecture-Id header, shared quota with AI Studio UI. Strict OpenAI compatibility for chat completions and images; async submit+poll (or webhook) for videos. Built as a thin adapter over aiStudioService.createGeneration.
